message:
MVCC concurrent commit improvements + E2E bench/recording enhancements

Connection (fsqlite-core):
- Extract pending_commit_pages computation before plan_concurrent_commit
  to avoid double-borrow of active_txn during commit path
- Thread pending_commit_pages slice through plan_concurrent_commit,
  plan_concurrent_commit_with_registry, and
  track_pending_commit_pages_with_registry to eliminate redundant
  per-call page extraction

Pager (fsqlite-pager):
- Split freelist into durable (page <= db_size) and in-memory-only
  segments during serialization — EOF pages from rolled-back concurrent
  transactions are kept in the live freelist but excluded from the
  page-1 trunk/leaf chain on disk
- Generalize committed-freelist snapshot pinning: any transaction with
  active_transactions > 1 now pins the freelist, not just Concurrent
  mode, preventing stale-freelist reuse across overlapping writers

Bench summary (fsqlite-e2e):
- Add per-run latency_ms tracking to RunAccumulator for accurate
  percentile aggregation across repeated benchmark iterations
- Replace synthetic ops-per-sec-derived latency with real per-run
  LatencySummary data via summarize_latency()

Recording (fsqlite-e2e):
- Apply json_escape to preset and timestamp fields in session_start
  and summary JSON output, preventing injection from special characters
- Replace bare epoch-seconds timestamp with proper ISO 8601 format
  (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.mmmZ) using Howard Hinnant's civil calendar
  algorithm for days-to-YMD conversion

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
